Off Calendar Jul-06-2005 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-24-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Petitioner David Luis Abad, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants K.J. Woods Construction, Inc., a California Corporation and Neil Arthur Quinn, an individual, for $10,000 total judgment.
Judgment signed in by Comm. Kaplan.
